summary_en: Progress update on cost-of-capital and stock-price-aware management framework initially disclosed May 2024. New medium-term plan (Dream Action 2030, FY3/30 horizon) published May 2024. Framework revised following updated analysis. Specific targets and metrics not disclosed in this summary document.
title_en: Progress on Measures for Realizing Cost-of-Capital and Stock-Price-Aware Management, and Future Initiatives
translation_en_brief: On 25 May 2026, Shimojima's board approved an update to its cost-of-capital and stock-price-aware management framework, first disclosed in May 2024. The company has completed its first medium-term plan (FY3/26 ending March 2026) and published a new plan, 'Dream Action 2030', with a horizon through FY3/30 (March 2030). The board resolved to revise and clarify the framework's approach and initiatives following updated analysis, with details deferred to an attached report. The specific numerical targets and revised metrics are referenced as being contained in the supplementary materials and the full medium-term plan document published on the company's investor relations website.
